transcript.clean_text: outside of the five monuments one of the most prestigious races on the cycling calendar this marked the 17th edition of the men's race starting and finishing in the picturesque city of Siena Tuscany at 184 kilometers it's not the longest race in the world but it's the gravel roads which make up over a third of the route that make it so tough to win or even to finish Monte Santa Maria is often the sector which separates the best from the rest but after that still three short but tough white gravel roads remain as well as that now Infamous climb in towards the Finish located at The Piazza del Campo Free Riders held an advantage of over four minutes as live coverage started and tomato circus wontonic Bistro Italian veteran Alessandra de Marquis now running for Jayco and Lula as well as the youngest man in the race 19 year old Ivan Romeo riding for Moby Style behind them there were the inevitable crashes as Riders Joshua position ahead of the most important sectors of the race both the Hungarian and Spanish Champions were involved in this one Attila vouta and Carlos Rodriguez respectively problems too for David formula a puncture for the rider who finished second here three years ago it would be a hard Chase back on for him on to Monte Santa Maria and Romeo was beginning to pay for the effort of his day behind him though local Rider Alberto betel was just starting his soon after they hit the gravel he was on the attack initially taking Andrea badgeri with him but two soon became three Tom picked up bridge in the gap for iniosk grenadiers they weren't three for long though yet another spectacular Daredevil descent from The Young Brit saw him distance the Two Italians and he would soon be setting off in loan pursuit of the day's early Breakaway had he Gone Too Soon that was the question going through our minds and probably his as well 45k Still Remains at the finish line but peacock was a man on a mission seemingly taking risks on every corner of the race the catch was eventually made with 42 kilometers to go pidcup joining the two leaders but behind probably sensing the danger Machu Vanderpool was on the move he of all people knows the danger of giving pidcup too much of a lead but he was quickly caught back by the group he'd just attacked Bahrain and yumba well represented in that group but who would do the chasing Bilbao Madras and cron were the next to try their luck but behind them awful luck for Magnus Sheffield and Alberto betio both those Riders hitting the deck and it was the Italian who'd come off the worst it was soon clear that it was not going to be thunder Paul's day the 2021 winner not right in the way that he or we are used to seeing him pigock's Advantage was never a comfortable one with 26 K's to go it was still hovering around the half minute Mark the race was far from over but it was for this group the fourth on the road for a handgirl chasing valiantly but it was to be in vain they were still in with a Chance including Costa benote Simmons and others and they finally got themselves organized with three gravel sections remaining on that sector the lights went out for demarchy leaving pigcock to plow on solo out front was particularly active behind attacking on numerous occasions to try to get away but every time he was brought back One Time by his very own teammate Attila voucher your six Riders remained in the chase on the penultimate sector and as they hit the final one let's hope they the Gap was down to just 14 seconds this race would hang in the balance to the very last falter despite his earlier crash was looking the best of that group at this point in the race gapping his Rivals and his teammate and slashing the Gap to pidcock to just seven seconds by the top of the climb was the brick cracking did he have something left in the tank well by this point in the race everyone was at their limit and it was to pidcock's Advantage the games of Cat and Mouse had well and truly started behind him nobody able or perhaps Willy to put everything they had into the chase seven seconds became 80 and then back up to almost half a minute as the lone leader saw the welcome sight of the flan Rouge marking a thousand meters to go no Brit had ever won the men's edition of strata Bianchi before today fifth place here a couple of years ago for pidcock was their best efforts he was on the verge of making history as he came into Siena The Piazza del Campo he knew it was his sacked across world champion Olympic mountain bike champion and now winner Estrada Bianca behind him Valentin madwas the Frenchman of grupama fdj had enough left in the tank to outsprint teaspino to former winner for second place on the day behind them it was Costa and valtter who battle it out for fourth place the former world champion taking that but the day belonged to this man that will go down as one of the most impressive wins of his career so far almost 50 kilometers out front doing almost all of the work on his own here's the rest of the top 10 teammates mahorich and Bilbao in sixth and seventh great wide by Gregoire in eighth place Davido formula in ninth and KRON rounding out the top ten well after that spectacular race we'll be back tomorrow with paronise where we'll see pagacha and vinegar battle it out together you can catch that on gsm plus territory restrictions apply I'll be back on Monday in Italy with Torino adriatico see you then bye for now
